title: Reconcile maturity-level + validation-layer doc drift (REQ-H6)
description: Unify the three disagreeing maturity ladders to ONE canonical model: framework/maturity-model.md (7 levels 0-6, Manual..Self-Improving), docs/levels/ (6 files 1-6), CLAUDE.md (7 named Foundation..Mastery). Update framework/validation-patterns.md intro from four-layer to FIVE layers (adds Browser Verification). Add a single NUMBERED capability matrix to docs/comparison.md (include Cursor/Devin/Spec-Kit/OpenHands, ✅/🟡/❌ cells). Spec: REQ-H6.
